title: Dyable Bricks
description: A mod that allows you to dye bricks.
body:
Tired of plain bricks?

 

Dyable bricks is a forge mod for 1.19.4 that adds over 15 new colors of brick, to allow you, the player, to build bright structures and builds, all of the bricks able to be crafted cheaply, with only 8 normal bricks surrounding 1 dye for 8, and traded for. What will you build?

 

I want to update this mod in the near future, to add things such as stairs, and to make it support multiple different versions of Minecraft.
